allow: Bash(node -e "const {Client} = require\('pg'\); const c = new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/smc_db'}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('SELECT 1'\)\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('ok'\); c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.log\('error:',e.message\); c.end\(\)}\)")
